title: FasterNight
description:
CHECK DESCRIPTION 
This datapack/mod makes the night 2 minutes instead of 7 minutes, handy for creative worlds when you don't want to turn daylightcycle off, but you also don't want to need to set the time to day all the time
body:
- This datapack makes the night faster, the night is with this datapack enabled is 2 minutes long instead of the default 7 so. It makes the night shorter without cutting to day directly after 2 minutes to keep the vanilla feel of the night but making it so you don't always have to set the time to day manually. 
- <font color = "blue"> disclaimers </font>
    - <font color = "orange">this datapack/mod will set your day counter back to zero!</font>
    - <font color = "orange">all mod versions require [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/project/P7dR8mSH)</font>
